title: Jordan
html:
Jordan

The Levantine country Yahir traveled in September 2023 with Emilio as part of the Jordan/Israel/Egypt arc — the trip that anchors his Mid-East travel cluster and one of the densest brother-bond stories in the corpus. Jordan in the graph is functionally bracketed with Israel and Egypt as a single 2023 trip, but it carries unique weight as the venue of two specific events: the off-trail Petra near-miss with Emilio, and the rogue-credit-union moneyless-between-borders incident.

The bucket-list moment shows up implicitly in 2021 05 04 turkey egypt bucket list (May 2021) — Yahir's three-line travel wishlist (Egypt, Turkey, Central America, Brazil) — though Jordan itself is not named there, suggesting the Mid-East trip was originally planned as Egypt-only and accreted into a multi-country route by 2023. The May 2023 trip-log 2023 05 13 travel trip log is cryptic — "Jordan/Israel/Egypt - refer to journal entry" — meaning Yahir is treating the stretch as substantial enough to deserve a separate long-form note rather than a bullet list.

The actual trip log lives in 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary (September 2023, real-time notes from the ground). The Jordan portion: Petra half-day plus full-day ($50 entrance fee captured), then Amman, then the flight onward to Egypt. The detail that survives best is the Petra entry — paired with 2024 08 14 travel occurrences which adds the load-bearing context: "Accidentally going off-trail at Petra with Emilio and having to scale down a mountain." That single-line catalog entry is one of the most cinematic brother-bond stories in the corpus — they made the same kind of dumb decision together and survived it together. Emilio's only named travel-companion appearance is on this trip.

The 2024 travel stories catalog adds the Levant-cluster mishap: "Essentially moneyless between Jordan and Israel thanks to a rogue credit union." This is the trip's transit-arc story — moving from Jordan into Israel with no functional payment mechanism, presumably because his US credit union flagged the international transactions as suspicious and froze the card mid-trip. The fact that the moneyless-between-borders detail survives in the catalog three years later means it's the single highest-friction moment of the Jordan stretch.

Jordan is one of the four pre-China chapter geographies (with India, Vietnam, Egypt) that establish: by the time Yahir lands in Shanghai in September 2024, he has already been on the road in three continents. The Mid-East stretch is the one with the highest adversity-to-companionship-ratio of his trips — Petra near-miss with Emilio, financial scramble across the border. Shared with a sibling, recovered from together.
